meta.title: Courier Offers & Student Rates | Eagle Logistics
meta.description: Festive parcel offers, international shipping discounts and special student courier rates for university applications from Eagle Logistics in Bangalore.
meta.imageAlt: Special courier offers from Eagle Logistics

content.title: Special Offers
content.headline: Celebrate festivals with Eagle Logistics festive offers
content.lead: Missing sharing festival joy with loved ones abroad?
content.reassure: Eagle Logistics is here to help.
body: For the festive season and New Year, Eagle Logistics introduces offers so you can share joy with family and friends around the world.
Festivals such as New Year, Ugadi, Dussehra, Diwali and Christmas are moments to cherish relationships wherever your family is. We bridge that gap with promotions for valued customers.
features: Reliable and secure delivery across India
Express delivery worldwide at discounted rates
content.offerNote: Customers receive discounts on premium and international shipments during festive periods. International bookings may also qualify for lucky-draw coupons — conditions apply.

promoCard.line1: Send parcels to the USA from Bangalore

sections.title: University applications
sections.subtitle: Special discounts on international courier for students
sections.lead: Need a reliable courier for university applications abroad?
sections.reassure: Eagle Logistics is built for that.
body: We offer special student discounts for applications from India to the UK, USA, Australia, New Zealand and other major destinations.
Exclusive messenger services deliver applications reliably, quickly and securely.
Enjoy premium express service with discounts, loyalty benefits and dedicated support.
The more you ship, the more you gain.
